title: EARLY LEARNING HUB - 211info
text: NORTHWEST EARLY LEARNING HUB EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Maintains resource list that are child-centered, family-friendly, and linguistically appropriate and community-based for parents and guardians of children. Connects families to kindergarden readiness programs. 5825 NE Ray Circle Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (503) 614-1699 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 614-1699 Central Hub Line Program contact (503) 614-3188 Abby Lutskovsky [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English and Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, and Tillamook Counties Services: School Readiness Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
